blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A). Confirm that the washer motor (B) rotates smoothly and without abnormality when battery voltage is applied between each terminal. Connect the coupler.

items: When applying battery voltage, be very careful not to short-circuit the battery.
If there is a problem with the motor and it does not rotate smoothly, replace the washer motor.
If the motor is not abnormal, rotates smoothly, and does not discharge washer fluid, inspect the following items.
Washer Tube disconnected, clogged, or broken
